oidMappings.label: Alarm Lamp Status and Lamp Clear
oidMappings.evidenceUse: Baseline alarm lamp state and clear evidence.
oidMappings.notes: Task source names this as Lamp Status and Lamp Clear. Exact production interpretation should be verified against the NEC MIB.

oidMappings.label: Major Alarm Lamp
oidMappings.evidenceUse: Detects major PABX alarm lamp condition for Alarm Console and fault candidate evidence.
oidMappings.notes: Does not by itself prove a production outage; indicates major alarm lamp state.

oidMappings.label: Minor Alarm Lamp
oidMappings.evidenceUse: Detects minor PABX alarm lamp condition for operational triage.
oidMappings.notes: Severity should be confirmed with customer alarm policy.

oidMappings.label: Supervisor Alarm Lamp
oidMappings.evidenceUse: Detects supervisor alarm lamp availability and active state.
oidMappings.notes: Value 0 should be treated as not available rather than clear.

oidMappings.label: Failure Message

valueSemantics.delivery: sent as a trap to SNMP Manager

oidMappings.evidenceUse: Preserves NEC failure message text as raw evidence for Alarm Console and reports.
oidMappings.notes: Exact trap payload format and severity derivation require verification.

oidMappings.label: System Message Trap
oidMappings.evidenceUse: Captures NEC PABX system messages delivered to the SNMP Manager.
oidMappings.notes: Group-level coverage only. Do not implement until exact trap OID and varbind format are verified.

oidMappings.label: CPU Usage
oidMappings.evidenceUse: Candidate monitoring for PABX processing load and early warning.
oidMappings.notes: NEC private MIB includes cpu group, but exact child OID is not provided in the task source.

oidMappings.label: Traffic
oidMappings.evidenceUse: Candidate monitoring for PABX traffic load once exact OIDs are verified.

oidMappings.label: Circuit Card / Port Status
oidMappings.evidenceUse: Candidate monitoring for circuit card or port degradation affecting telephony service.
oidMappings.notes: NEC private MIB includes port group, but exact child OID/table structure is not provided.

oidMappings.label: Terminal / Registration Info
oidMappings.evidenceUse: Candidate monitoring for terminal registration visibility once exact OIDs are verified.
oidMappings.notes: NEC private MIB includes terminal and registrationInfo groups, but exact child OIDs are not provided.
